name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the C2CPO SDK

labels: bug
assignees: DheelepN
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment

- **SDK Language:** Python / Node.js
- **SDK Version:** (e.g. 1.0.0)
- **Tier in use:** Tier 1 / Tier 2
- **Python version / Node.js version:**
- **Operating System:**

## Steps to Reproduce

```python
# Minimal reproduction case
from c2cpo import Tier1

tier1 = Tier1(endpoint_id="test")
# ...
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages, stack traces, or SIEM events emitted.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (payload size, production vs. staging, key manager backend used, etc.).

---

> 🔒 **Do NOT report security vulnerabilities here.** Use [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/DheelepN/C2CPO/security/advisories/new) instead.
